import React from 'react' function Merch(props) { const{_id, name, price, description, stock , category} = props.merchandise; return (

Merchandise show

ID: {_id}

Name: {name}

Price: LKR.{price}

Description: {description}

Stock: {stock}

Category: {category}

) } export default Merch
